$comment: Phase 4 (TODO-05) Full-Stack Blueprint Reconciliation verdict. Binary gate (GRAND BLUEPRINT APPROVED / REJECTED - no partial states). Reconciles architecture (HLD + openapi.yaml) against design (phase-3) across BA + PM + SA + UI/UX. consensus-agent + hallucination-detector + context-faithfulness-engineer roles applied.
gate_type: BINARY (GRAND BLUEPRINT APPROVED / GRAND BLUEPRINT REJECTED - no partial states)

gate_checks.ui_component_to_api_field_binding: PASS - all 8 audited components bind to real openapi.yaml fields (reconciliation_matrix.md, 8/8 rows CONSISTENT after in-session fixes)
gate_checks.api_response_for_ui_exists: PASS - every field the UI needs exists on the response it consumes; no invented shape
gate_checks.sse_streaming_path: PASS - TokenEvent.token -> AnswerFinalEvent.answer; mid-stream event:error->Problem honored by design (ErrorState MidStream + role=alert)
gate_checks.citation_path: PASS - AnswerFinalEvent.citations[] = Citation{section_title, page_start, page_end}; page-range authority from Postgres sections (OAQ-3)
gate_checks.confidence_path: PASS - ConfidenceMeter binds routing.confidence[] via defined reduction max(confidence[]) (GRC-002); PRD 8.3 thresholds
gate_checks.explainability_path: PASS - ExplainabilityPanel binds routing.rationale + sections[] x confidence[] joined to TocResponse.toc[] by section_id (GRC-001)
gate_checks.fallback_mode_ui_matches_router_contract: PASS - FallbackBanner/ConfidenceMeter Fallback variant match routing.fallback (query-time), TocResponse.fallback_only (structural), 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE (degraded)
gate_checks.adr_compliance: PASS - 10 ADRs honored; no openapi.yaml modification; in-process async router; /v1/route routing-only; /v1/answer SSE
gate_checks.agreed_contracts_compliance: PASS - team-alignment AGREED CONTRACTS honored; section_id universal join key throughout
gate_checks.hallucination: PASS - 0 fabricated API fields, 0 invented response shapes, 0 phantom FRs
gate_checks.context_faithfulness: PASS - all resolutions traceable to openapi.yaml/hld.md; no unsourced claims

in_session_fixes: GRC-001 (CRITICAL): ExplainabilityPanel renders section title/page-range via client-side join of routing.sections[i] (section_id) to the already-loaded TocResponse.toc[]; recorded in hld_v3.md §R1. No openapi.yaml change.
GRC-002 (MEDIUM): ConfidenceMeter scalar = max(routing.confidence[]); fallback variant when routing.fallback or empty array; recorded in design_spec_v2_notes.md.
GRC-003 (LOW): Ingest badge mapping aligned to IngestResponse.ingest_status enum [indexed, fallback_only, ephemeral] and Document.fallback_only; recorded in design_spec_v2_notes.md.
hld_v3_reason: SA recorded one additive in-place binding-path note (§R1) resolving GRC-001 (ExplainabilityPanel TOC join). No structural HLD changes; hld.md §1-8 stand unchanged.
design_spec_v2_notes_reason: UI/UX recorded two design-side binding rules (GRC-002 confidence reduction, GRC-003 badge mapping). No wireframe/token changes; phase-3 design stands unchanged.

needs_user_decision.question: Ship light theme only for MVP, or also a dark theme?
needs_user_decision.recommended_default: Light theme only for MVP (all APCA values computed for light). Dark theme is an additive Phase-B token set; defer to keep the MVP surface small.

needs_user_decision.topic: Rerank control visibility (FR-016, carried from Phase 3)
needs_user_decision.question: Expose the per-request rerank toggle in the personal-tool composer, or keep it backend-default-off?
needs_user_decision.recommended_default: Hidden advanced toggle, default off, for MVP (AnswerRequest.rerank defaults false). Surface only if power users ask.

instruction_to_phase_5_and_b: GRAND BLUEPRINT APPROVED. Architecture and design are reconciled with 0 open items. Phase B implementers MUST honor: (1) ExplainabilityPanel client-side TOC join (hld_v3.md §R1), (2) ConfidenceMeter max(confidence[]) reduction (design_spec_v2_notes.md), (3) ingest badge enum mapping (design_spec_v2_notes.md). Carry the 8 Phase-2 + 3 Phase-4 advisories to their target agents. No openapi.yaml or phase-3 design change is required to start implementation.
